# fly_ip_addresses (Data Source)

Retrieves IP addresses allocated to a Fly.io application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_ip_addresses" "example" {
  app = "my-existing-app"
}

output "addresses" {
  value = data.fly_ip_addresses.example.ip_addresses
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The name of the application to look up IP addresses for.

### Read-Only

- `ip_addresses` (Attributes List) The list of IP addresses allocated to the application. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ip_addresses))

<a id="nestedatt--ip_addresses"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ip_addresses`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) The IP address.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the IP address was allocated.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the IP address allocation.
- `region` (String) The region of the IP address.
- `type` (String) The type of IP address (v4, v6, shared_v4, private_v6).
